nasb.text: And He did not answer him with regard to even a single charge, so the governor was quite amazed.

esv.text: But he gave him no answer, not even to a single charge, so that the governor was greatly amazed.

cnv.text: 耶穌一句話也不回答他，令總督非常驚奇。

ccb.text: 耶稣仍然一言不发，彼拉多感到十分惊奇。

csbs.text: 耶稣连一句话也不回答，以致总督感到非常惊奇。
